title: Setting dependency from main to subtask
excerpt: I would really like the ability to link subitems to main tasks via dependancy. It would really help in creating a workflow in projects woth several phases where the end of one phase kicks off several activities in the ne…

posts.author: norcanmon (Bjørnar Lingjerde)
posts.cookedHtml: I would really like the ability to link subitems to main tasks via dependancy. It would really help in creating a workflow in projects woth several phases where the end of one phase kicks off several activities in the next phase
